name: Chase Dovey
title: AI Architect & Engineering Leader
summary: AI engineering leader specializing in the design and security of production agentic systems. I architect agent runtimes, tool execution and sandboxing, memory and retrieval, orchestration, and evaluation, then build the guardrails and red-teaming that keep them reliable in adversarial, high-consequence environments. At HiddenLayer I secure agentic systems for enterprise customers and build product for agentic red teaming and adversarial prompt engineering. I founded cAIge, the vendor-agnostic Certified AI Guardrail Engineer program, defining an industry taxonomy for prompt-injection defense, data-exfiltration prevention, and guardrail validation. Deep working knowledge of foundation-model internals and the math beneath them, backed by a decade of architecture, engineering, and technical leadership across enterprise and education at scale.

experience.title: AI Architect
highlights: Architect and secure production agentic systems for enterprise customers: agent loops, tool execution and sandboxing, memory and retrieval, and security boundaries, threat-modeling prompt injection, tool-output poisoning, and sandbox escape
Build product for agentic red teaming and adversarial prompt engineering, generating multi-turn attack flows that surface misuse and failure modes in customer AI systems
Develop core platform capabilities and customer integrations, turning research prototypes into reliable, shipped product
Advise customers on evaluation and guardrail strategy grounded in foundation-model internals, balancing operator trust, reliability, and performance

experience.title: Chief Research Scientist
highlights: Founded an open, community-driven research lab and lead its applied AI work: agent runtimes, episodic and semantic memory harnesses, sandboxed tool execution, and multi-provider inference gateways
Drove autonomous-research programs to systematically discover better context-management, memory, tool-use, planning, and orchestration strategies for agents
Built adversarial-AI research, including a generalized red-team agent and a zero-training, embedding-space prompt-injection detector
Authored a framework-free, code-first agentic-engineering curriculum and a research-engineering learning path, mentoring newcomers into independent research

experience.title: Chief Enterprise Architect
highlights: Lead AI and cloud strategy for enterprise clients: AI agent development, RAG implementation, supervised fine-tuning, and AI model infrastructure
Authored a vendor-agnostic GenAI adoption framework for planning, governing, and scaling generative AI across the enterprise
Advise executives on AI architecture and adoption, aligning AI investments with security and measurable business outcomes

experience.title: Senior Content Developer
highlights: Spearheaded technical enablement for Azure Container Registry (ACR) on Microsoft Docs, integrating AI-driven workflows with cloud architecture expertise
Designed and published scenario-driven content, reaching over 500K developers monthly
Developed an AI-powered authoring pipeline, reducing time-to-first-draft from 3 days to under 5 minutes

experience.title: Chief Executive Officer
highlights: Co-founded Chasing Cloud Careers, focusing on accessible engineering education
Curated free learning resources into structured paths for various engineering roles
Mentored professionals in career transitions, fostering a supportive learning community
Developed self-directed learning approaches that empower individuals to explore technology careers

experience.title: Principal Cloud Architect
highlights: Designed and implemented secure, scalable cloud solutions on Azure and AWS for migrations, modernization, and AI-enabled architecture
Delivered 13 enterprise projects, averaging $94K per engagement, focusing on AI/LLM-driven architectures and enterprise AI adoption
Designed cloud-native PoCs using Hugging Face NLP models and advised executives on scaling AI workloads across multi-cloud platforms
Engineered reusable IaC patterns, reducing deployment errors by 40% and provisioning effort significantly

experience.title: Training Architect - Azure
experience.company: Linux Academy | A Cloud Guru | Pluralsight
highlights: Authored 9 Azure certification courses, achieving over 20.8M minutes viewed and a 4.1/5 learner rating
Developed 50+ auto-provisioned labs, enabling 175K+ completions while reducing setup time by 90%
Audited over 150 hours of content, resolving ~1,300 tickets and improving course ratings from 4.3 to 4.6
Authored and refreshed 400+ exam assets, boosting learner pass rates by 10% for key certifications

experience.title: Jr. Systems Administrator
highlights: Supported shared, VPS, and dedicated hosting environments for over 600 SMB customers in a 24/7 operations team
Resolved ~105 support tickets monthly with a 96% customer satisfaction rate
Automated repetitive tasks using Bash, reducing average ticket handle time by 18%
Executed zero-downtime migrations for 80+ WordPress sites, ensuring SLA compliance

projects.name: cAIge: Certified AI Guardrail Engineer
projects.description: Founded the vendor-agnostic AI guardrail engineering certification: a five-domain taxonomy and exam covering prompt-injection defense, data-exfiltration prevention, adversarial attack mitigation, and guardrail validation.

projects.name: Agent runtimes and orchestration
projects.description: Standalone agent execution engines, the loop, tool dispatch, and event streaming, plus orchestration patterns (routing, orchestrator-workers, evaluator-optimizer) and a code-first agentic-engineering curriculum.

projects.name: Sandboxed tool execution
projects.description: Isolated Docker execution for agent tools with seccomp, dropped capabilities, resource limits, egress control, and lifecycle management to contain prompt-injection blast radius.

projects.name: Agent memory harnesses
projects.description: Episodic and semantic memory for agents: write-time fact extraction, hybrid BM25-plus-vector retrieval, and token-accurate working-memory management.

projects.name: Adversarial AI and red teaming
projects.description: A generalized red-team agent and a zero-training, embedding-space prompt-injection detector for evaluating and hardening agentic systems.

projects.name: Inference gateways and engines
projects.description: Multi-provider LLM gateways with routing, fallbacks, PII guardrails, quotas, and observability, plus an LLM inference engine and runtime built from scratch in Rust, Go, and PyTorch.

projects.name: Technical writing: cdovey.dev
projects.description: A deep technical series on LLM internals, agent architecture, and AI security: agent loops, memory, sandboxing, prompt injection, red teaming, and evaluation.

items: Intro to Gen AI Mini Course — AI by Hand (1st Cohort)
